Interface IBasicRasterSdeConnection

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control the RasterSDE connection.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("055452C1-0582-4863-B73E-1185095C2CC9")]
public interface IBasicRasterSdeConnection

Properties

Database

The database name.

string Database { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Sample Snippet

InputBitMaskName

The input 1-bit raster dataset name to be used as mask.

string InputBitMaskName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

The input raster dataset name.

string InputRasterName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Instance

The server instance.

string Instance { get; set; }

string

MaskRaster

The input raster mask to be loaded to SDE.

Property Value

IRaster

Password

The password.

string Password { get; set; }

string

Sample Snippet

Raster

The input raster to be loaded to SDE.

IRaster Raster { get; set; }

IRaster

SdeRasterName

The output raster dataset name.

string SdeRasterName { get; set; }

string

The SDE Connection, set through WorkspaceName object.
